actions.value:
Hi {{ticket.requester.first_name}},

Edge.app: Bitcoin & Crypto Wallet (formerly Airbitz), is a completely separate company from Microsoft Edge.

For their support, please try https://support.microsoft.com/en-us to get help with any of your Edge web browser issues.
-
If you want to download Edge to and get started with cryptocurrencies in a fun and easy way, I encourage you to give us a try and start holding some digital coins too: https://edge.app/get-started + we're here if you have questions for us!
